name: agentic-workflow
description: Drives tasks through PLAN → BUILD → VERIFY → REVIEW as a supervised, main-agent-driven loop with git isolation, trusted verdicts, a task backlog, and an audit trail. Tasks are authored and gated by the /agentic-workflow:engineering verbs (interview → draft → approve; the loop plans right before execution and parks the plan for the approve gate). Four sitter kinds watch hosted surfaces and drive fixes with every terminal call human: the stable /agentic-workflow:pr-sitter and review-sitter, plus the experimental dep-sitter and main-sitter.
